title: Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple
tagline: Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Tiruvalaputhur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Tiruvalaputhur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Manicka Vannar and Rathna Pureeswarar. His consort is known as Brama Kunthalambica and Vandar Poonkuzhali.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kundala Karaneswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Kundaleswarar or Kundalakaneswarar temple (Tamil: திருக்குரகாவல்)(குண்டலகரணேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple situated in the village of Thirukkurankaval near Vaitheeswaran Koil in Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India The presiding deity is KundalaKaraneswarar, a form of the Hindu god Shiva and his consort Bala Tripura Sundari. This place is also referred to as ThiruKurakkukka or Thiru KoranguKukka .

topPlaces.name: Veerateeswarar Temple, Korukkai
topPlaces.description: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Korukkai Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Korukkai in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Gnanambigai.

topPlaces.name: Perumangalam
topPlaces.description: Perumangalam, also formerly known as Thiruperumangalam, is a village situated 4 km west of Vaitheeswarankoil and to the north-east of Thiruppangur.

topPlaces.name: Sivalokanathar Temple, Tirupunkur
topPlaces.description: Sivalokanathar Temple (சிவலோகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is dedicated to the god Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Omampuliyur Thuyartheertanathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Omampuliyur Thuyartheertanathar Temple (ஓமாம்புலியூர் துயர்தீர்த்தநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Omapuliyur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Umapuliyur.

topPlaces.name: Anandathandavapuram
topPlaces.description: Anandathandavapuram, formerly known as Kancharu Tamil pronunciation: [Kañcāṟu], is a village located in Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu. The nearest town, Mayiladuthurai is located five kilometers, southerly.

topPlaces.name: Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple (பொன்னூர் ஆபத்சகாயேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Ponnur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tiru Anniyur.

topPlaces.name: Ayangudi, Cuddalore
topPlaces.description: Ayangudi is an Indian village located in Kattumannarkoil taluk in the Cuddalore, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 73 kilometres (45 mi) to the south of the district headquarters Cuddalore, 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Kattumannarkoil and 225 km from State capital Chennai.

items.note: The Kundaleswarar or Kundalakaneswarar temple (Tamil: திருக்குரகாவல்)(குண்டலகரணேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple situated in the village of Thirukkurankaval near Vaitheeswaran Koil in Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India The presiding deity is KundalaKaraneswarar, a form of the Hindu god Shiva and his consort Bala Tripura Sundari. This place is also referred to as ThiruKurakkukka or Thiru KoranguKukka .

Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Korukkai Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Korukkai in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Gnanambigai.
Perumangalam, also formerly known as Thiruperumangalam, is a village situated 4 km west of Vaitheeswarankoil and to the north-east of Thiruppangur.
Sivalokanathar Temple (சிவலோகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is dedicated to the god Shiva.

Omampuliyur Thuyartheertanathar Temple (ஓமாம்புலியூர் துயர்தீர்த்தநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Omapuliyur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Umapuliyur.

Anandathandavapuram, formerly known as Kancharu Tamil pronunciation: [Kañcāṟu], is a village located in Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu. The nearest town, Mayiladuthurai is located five kilometers, southerly.

Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple (பொன்னூர் ஆபத்சகாயேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Ponnur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tiru Anniyur.

Ayangudi is an Indian village located in Kattumannarkoil taluk in the Cuddalore, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 73 kilometres (45 mi) to the south of the district headquarters Cuddalore, 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Kattumannarkoil and 225 km from State capital Chennai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (111 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (111 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tiruvalaputhur Manickavannar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kundala Karaneswarar Temple, Veerateeswarar Temple, Korukkai, Perumangalam, Sivalokanathar Temple, Tirupunkur, Omampuliyur Thuyartheertanathar Temple.
